description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in WebED in Markus Iser ED Engine 0.8999 alpha allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the Codebase parameter to (1) channeledit.php, (2) post.php, (3) view.php, or (4) viewitem.php in source/mod/rss/.
